title: MP College Admissions 2026

detail.title: MP College Admissions 2026
detail.short_info: MP College Admissions 2026 online registration has started. Check complete schedule for UG, PG and teaching courses, important dates, eligibility, application process and direct link for e-Pravesh portal.

content.text: MP College Admissions 2026 for undergraduate (UG) and postgraduate (PG) courses have started. Online registration for UG courses begins on 1 May 2026, while PG registration starts on 2 May 2026. The entire admission process is being conducted online through the official e-Pravesh portal by the Department of Higher Education, Madhya Pradesh.

MP College Admissions 2026 for UG and PG courses have officially begun through the e-Pravesh portal. The Department of Higher Education, Madhya Pradesh has released the complete admission schedule for the academic session 2026-27.

Online registration for undergraduate courses starts on 1 May 2026 and for postgraduate courses on 2 May 2026. The process includes multiple counselling rounds and College Level Counselling (CLC) for vacant seats. This guide provides the full important dates table, eligibility, step-by-step application process, and direct links to help students successfully complete their MP College Admissions 2026 without any hassle.
Direct Link to get MP College Admissions 2026: Click Here

rows: UG, PG & Teaching Courses (B.Ed, M.Ed etc.)
Department of Higher Education, Madhya Pradesh

sections.heading: Important Dates for MP College Admissions 2026 First Round
Second Round Schedule for MP College Admissions 2026
Note: After the Second Round, College Level Counselling (CLC) will be conducted for vacant seats.

rows: As per NCTE norms for B.Ed / M.Ed

sections.heading: How to Apply for MP College Admissions 2026

items: Click on “New Registration” and create your account
Fill personal, academic and contact details
Submit the form and take a printout
Complete document verification as per schedule
